generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a senior citizen who remembers the Cold War, I'm deeply concerned about our national security. The world is more unstable than ever, and we can't afford to cut defense spending. Our allies are counting on us, and we need to show strength to deter aggression. I've seen firsthand how unpreparedness leads to chaos. Let's make sure our military has what it needs to keep us safe. #NationalSecurity #DefenseMatters
